response.step_by_step_log: The video begins with a performance of 'Koi wa Sensou' by Raora Pantera. The title is visible on-screen. I searched for '恋は戦争 ryo supercell Japanese and English lyrics' and successfully found the lyrics and translation on VocaDB and J-Lyric.net. After the song, the video shifts to a dialogue segment between Raora Pantera and Chattino, which does not contain vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D performance of the song 'Koi wa Sensou' by the character Raora Pantera, followed by a dialogue segment with Chattino.

scenes.description: A character (Raora Pantera) performs a 3D song in a digital environment. The song title '恋は戦争' (Love is War) is visible in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もう行き場がないわ この恋の熱量
灰色の雲 モノクロの喧騒
日差しはかげり 夕暮れは色を変えていく
嗚呼 世界がにじんで
それでも好きでいられるかなんて
わかってる けどどうすればいいの
どうしたら どうすれば
バカだな わたし…
始 めるのよ
これは 戦争
嬉しそうなキミをみるなんて
切 なる恋 それは罪
見 せてあげる わたしの想いを
叫 んでみたメガホンは壊れてたの
どれだけ背伸びしたって
君の視界に入らない
嗚呼 いつのまにか晴れた空
全然似合わない
気持ちが抑えられなくて
どうしたら どうすれば
泣いてなんか ないんだからね
大好き
た たかうのよ
ハ ートを撃て
手段なんて選んでられない
スカートひらり見せつけるのよ
君の視線奪ってみせるの
迎 撃 用意
戦況は未だ不利なのです
恋は 盲目
君の口づけで目が覚めるの!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
There's nowhere for it to go anymore, the heat of this love
The grey clouds, the monochrome clamor
The sunlight casts a shadow, the twilight changes color
The world blurs, even so, will I still be able to love you?
I know, but what should I do?
What should I do? What should I do?
I'm a fool, I...
It's starting now
This is war
I see you looking so happy
How can I stand to see that?
This painful love, it's a sin
I'll show you, all of my feelings
I shouted, but the megaphone is broken
No matter how much I stand on my tiptoes
I'll never enter your world
Ah, before I knew it, the sky cleared up
It doesn't fit at all
I can't hold back my feelings
What should I do? What should I do?
I'm not crying, you know
I love you
It's starting now
This is war
I'll shoot my heart through
I can't choose my methods
The skirt flutters, I'll show it to you
I'll steal your gaze and show it to you
It's starting now
This is war
I'll show you, I'll show you
Battle stations, ready
The war situation is still unfavorable
Love is blindness
I'll wake you up with a kiss from me.
